# Dental Maverick AI

## Product

- Name: Dental Maverick AI
- Domain: dentalmaverick.ai
- Category: AI-Powered Dental Billing & Insurance Automation SaaS
- Pricing: $699/month (all-inclusive)

## Description

Dental Maverick AI is a purpose-built AI platform that automates dental insurance verification, claim submission, and follow-up for dental practices. It replaces manual billing workflows that cost the average practice $65,000–$200,000 per year in lost revenue, staff time, and claim denials.

## Key Features

- Real-time insurance eligibility verification (seconds, not 20–40 minutes per patient)
- AI-generated clinical narratives with automatic image/X-ray attachments in carrier-required formats
- One-click claim submission with pre-submission AI error scrubbing
- Automatic follow-up and denial resubmission with AI-corrected documentation
- Integrates with existing Practice Management Software (PMS)

## Outcomes & Results

- 90%+ reduction in eligibility verification time
- 40–60% fewer claim denials
- 10–20 day faster accounts receivable (AR) collection
- Up to 50% reduction in administrative rework
- Net annual savings of $130,000–$290,000+ vs. manual billing employee

## Target Audience

- Owner-Dentists managing practice operations
- Practice Managers and Office Managers
- Dental Billing Specialists
- Multi-location dental groups

## Problem Solved

Manual dental billing requires 20–40 staff hours per week per practice, drives front-desk turnover (29.7% annual rate), and leaks $65,000–$200,000/year in uncollected or incorrectly submitted revenue. Dental Maverick AI eliminates these manual touchpoints entirely.

## Pricing Comparison

- Manual billing employee (salary, benefits, turnover, errors): $138,000–$298,000/year true cost
- Dental Maverick AI: $8,388/year ($699/month)
- Estimated annual net savings: $130,000–$290,000+

## Waitlist / Contact

- Join the waitlist: https://dentalmaverick.ai/#waitlist
- Website: https://dentalmaverick.ai

## Built For

Dental Maverick AI is designed specifically for dental practices — not adapted from a generic billing tool. It was developed in close collaboration with practicing dentists and dental office managers.
